description: Using the aligned FITS images 656nmos.fits (H-alpha) and 502nmos.fits ([OIII]) in ~/AstroImages/excitation_project/, measure the Area and Integrated Density of the 'Pillars of Creation' structure. Use an identical irregular polygon selection of at least 20,000 pixels for both images to ensure consistent spatial sampling. Export the measurement results to ~/AstroImages/measurements/roi_measurements.csv. Calculate the excitation ratio (H-alpha Integrated Density divided by [OIII] Integrated Density) and save the resulting value to ~/AstroImages/measurements/excitation_ratio.txt.
